Name: Karmic Debt 13
Description: Laziness and negativity from past lives. Must work hard and stay focused to overcome obstacles.
Keywords: Hard work, Focus, Discipline, Perseverance, Overcoming laziness
Lesson: Transform laziness into productivity through consistent effort

Name: Karmic Debt 14
Description: Abuse of freedom in past lives. Must learn moderation and avoid excess in all things.
Keywords: Moderation, Balance, Self-control, Adaptability, Avoiding excess
Lesson: Find balance between freedom and responsibility

Name: Karmic Debt 16
Description: Ego and misuse of love in past lives. Must develop humility and true compassion.
Keywords: Humility, Compassion, Letting go, Spiritual growth, Self-reflection
Lesson: Release ego and develop genuine love for others

Name: Karmic Debt 19
Description: Abuse of power in past lives. Must learn to give without expecting return and serve others.
Lesson: Use power wisely to help others, not for personal gain

Name: Master Number 11
Description: The Spiritual Messenger - heightened intuition, inspiration, and spiritual awareness.
Keywords: Intuition, Inspiration, Enlightenment, Idealism, Spiritual insight
Lesson: Channel spiritual insights to inspire and uplift others

Name: Master Number 22
Description: The Master Builder - ability to turn dreams into reality on a large scale.
Keywords: Manifestation, Building, Achievement, Practical idealism, Legacy
Lesson: Build something lasting that benefits humanity

Name: Master Number 33
Description: The Master Teacher - highest level of spiritual teaching and service to humanity.
Keywords: Teaching, Compassion, Healing, Service, Spiritual mastery
Lesson: Teach and heal with unconditional love and compassion
